interactions.summary: Kim suggests Israel benefits when everyone else fights, and Jiang agrees by comparing Pax Judaica to Pax Britannica: a small power maintains dominance by sowing global chaos.

Kim asks where World War III goes, who fights, when it began, and who wins. Jiang answers that World War III began with the 2021/2022 Ukraine proxy war, will go global this year, and will center first on Ukraine/Europe/Russia and a U.S.-China grand bargain over dollars, markets, embargo power, and Western Hemisphere commodities.

speaker_notes.note: SPEAKER_01 is Kim; SPEAKER_00 is Jiang. seg-0093 has ASR damage but clearly states the Ukraine proxy-war thesis.

claims.claim: Jiang says Israel will maintain Pax Judaica like Pax Britannica: a small resource-limited power keeps dominance by sowing discontent and chaos throughout the world.
Jiang says World War III has already been underway since Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2021/2022, because Ukraine is a U.S./NATO proxy war against Russia.
claims.temporal_scope: Dated war chronology stated on 2026-04-01; Jiang gives a 2021/2022 start and ties it to Russia's invasion of Ukraine.

claims.claim: Jiang predicts Ukraine will remain a major flashpoint because Europeans cannot give up Project Ukraine, will send volunteers or special forces, move toward conscription and German remilitarization, and provoke Russia further.

Jiang says Trump will continue siding with Russia against Europe because he hates Europeans, while exerting dominance over the Western Hemisphere to bargain with Xi over dollars, markets, embargo threats, and commodities China needs for AI, EVs, batteries, solar, and high-tech industry.

signature_moments.moment: Pax Judaica inherits the British method: rule from smallness by making the world fight itself.
signature_moments.source_phrase: sowing discontent and chaos throughout the entire world
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It connects the Israel thesis to Jiang's long imperial-finance model.

signature_moments.moment: World War III is not a future switch to be flipped; in Jiang's telling it already began as a proxy war in Ukraine.
signature_moments.source_phrase: we've been in World War III ever since... Russia invaded Ukraine
signature_moments.why_it_matters: This reframes the interview's war question from whether war begins to how it expands.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang's term for Europe's continued commitment to Ukraine as a geopolitical project that it cannot abandon without crisis.
A future Trump-Xi settlement over U.S. dollar support, Chinese market access, Western Hemisphere commodities, and U.S. naval chokehold power.

chronology_notes.note: On 2026-04-01 Jiang says World War III began in 2021/2022 with Ukraine and predicts 2026 escalation, including an April Trump-Xi meeting as the first of four scheduled meetings that year.

uncertainty_notes.note: Jiang's start date phrase '2021, 2022, when Russia invaded Ukraine' is internally imprecise; Russia's full-scale invasion date should be handled carefully in public chronology.
The phrase 'nationalize the UN' is likely ASR damage; the surrounding point concerns China switching from dollars to gold or otherwise undermining the dollar system.
